name: query-ransomware-service-manipulation
bodyMarkdown:
# Ransomware Service Manipulation Detection Query

**Category:** Detection Chokepoints | **Maturity:** Hunt | **FP Rate:** Medium
**Techniques:** T1562.001, T1489 | **Log Sources:** WEL 7036, Sysmon EID 1

```kql
DeviceProcessEvents
| where Timestamp > ago(1h)
| where FileName in ("sc.exe", "net.exe", "net1.exe", "taskkill.exe")
| where ProcessCommandLine has_any ("stop", "delete")
| where ProcessCommandLine has_any ("Sophos", "WinDefend", "Veeam", "VSS", "wbengine", "MSSQL", "backup")
| project Timestamp, DeviceName, FileName, ProcessCommandLine, InitiatingProcessFileName
| sort by Timestamp desc
```
